# st-speed — Analyze AI provider performance and speed

Compares AI provider performance across a container: generation time, tokens per second, and time-to-first-token. Useful for choosing a provider when speed matters.

**Run after:** `st-bang` · `st-cross`

**Related:** [st-stones](st-stones) · [st-cross](st-cross) · [st-heatmap](st-heatmap)

---

## For developers

Reads `timing{}` dicts from `data[]` entries. Timing is written by `st-gen` on every non-cached call and is absent on cache hits.
